reviews.title: Room smell and staff unfriendliness.
reviews.text: The room has a strong smell of electronic cigarettes, and I met two staff members who were both quite rude and unfriendly. When I inquired about breakfast usage, they responded in a commanding tone, saying that this can't be done, which was quite unpleasant.

reviews.title: The value for money was not bad, but please change the check-in and check-out times.
reviews.text: It says on Agoda that check-in is at 4 PM and check-out is at 12 PM, so I was trying to leave by 12 PM, but around 11:20 AM, someone knocked on the door and said it was check-out at 11 AM. Even when I mentioned that it says 12 PM on Agoda, they just said "Oh, check-out is at 11 AM" without any explanation;; hahaha what is this? You should change the time or something, I wasn't feeling great about it.

reviews.title: Value-for-money accommodation
reviews.text: Overall, it is a clean and cost-effective accommodation.

reviews.title: Generally satisfied.
reviews.text: Hotel accessibility, parking, cleanliness, staff friendliness, accessibility to nearby restaurants, good environment at night. One downside is that there is always water pooled on the floor after using the bathroom (rubber floor squeegee - costs about 2,000 won at Daiso).

reviews.title: Clean and well managed facility
reviews.text: Located in the night life area but the facility was well maintained and the bed was outstanding. Staffs? Worked and responded like a dummy guest.

reviews.title: Best value accommodation~!
reviews.text: The room and bathroom were clean considering the inexpensive price~ Moreover, I loved the simple yet hearty breakfast with toast, cereal, and brewed coffee provided. I had a great stay. I would definitely consider using this place again next time~^^

reviews.title: Water is dripping from the air conditioner, so I can't sleep well...
reviews.text: Everything else was great. There was a convenience store nearby, the parking area was spacious, and the staff were friendly. I stayed in room 306, and when I turned on the air conditioner for a moment, it started leaking water, and even after I turned it off, it kept dripping all night while I was sleeping. I checked in too late, so it was a hassle to change rooms, so I just dealt with it. I was a little disappointed about that, but everything else was good.

reviews.title: A comfortable overnight stay to rest a tired body.
reviews.text: It was my first time in the region, and the hotel recommended by Agoda was cozy, warm, and clean. Thank you.

reviews.title: Good for a one-night stay.
reviews.text: It's nice to stay for one night on a business trip in a quiet location.

reviews.title: The location is great~
reviews.text: It was a last-minute accommodation search during the holiday period, and the location is really great. The bus terminal is close, and there are bus stops nearby. The room and bathroom are spacious, and the bed is comfortable. The water pressure in the bathroom is very strong. The free breakfast is served from 6 to 9 and includes bread and drinks. The staff's response is somewhat formal. You can see the Geum River from a small window. I think I would choose to stay here again if I come back!

reviews.title: It's good for the price.
reviews.text: The price is reasonable and clean. The location is good too.

reviews.title: Better cost-performance than expected.
reviews.text: At first, the smell from the elevator was not great, but once I entered the room, I was captivated by the massage chair and Netflix. It was nice to stay comfortably for one night. I had a slight question?! I received a call at 11 o'clock about the check-out time, even though check-out is at 12 o'clock. Thanks to that, I left early, but there was only one parking lot at the place I wanted to go, so it was good that I left at that time! There were plenty of food options nearby, and it was quieter than I expected. I wonder why?

reviews.title: The bed is super comfortable and clean.
reviews.text: 호텔을 가면 항상 침대 시트가 걱정스러웠는데 바스락 거리는 면 재질에 에이스 매트리스로. 쾌적합니다 건물은 살짝 오래 되었으나 화장실도 깨긋하고 간단한 아침이나 제공되어서 좋았어요 편안하게 쉬었습니다

reviews.title: The accommodation I heard about while passing by.
reviews.text: It was a place I stayed at while passing by, but it was clean and comfortable for the price. The breakfast was also simple and tidy.

reviews.title: I think it's good!
reviews.text: It is conveniently located near the express bus terminal, and the bridge to the opposite shore is also close by, making it convenient for sightseeing. The facilities were also clean and tidy.

reviews.title: Free breakfast
reviews.text: Well designed and clean.  Free simple breakfast is offered.

reviews.title: It was clean and comfortable.
reviews.text: The accommodation was clean and the bed was comfortable. The simple complimentary breakfast also added to the enjoyment of the trip. It is close to Gongsanseong Fortress, making it nice for an evening walk.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: It was close to the Gongju intercity bus terminal and the Gongju Fortress was within a 20-minute walk, making it great for traveling. In front of the hotel, there was a park and a river, which was nice for an evening stroll. There were many restaurants and convenience stores around the hotel, making it convenient. The price was affordable, so I didn't have high expectations, but the hotel was beautiful, the room was spacious, the bathroom was large, and the bed was clean, so I had a good night's rest. I definitely want to stay here again next time I visit.

reviews.title: Cleanliness
reviews.text: When I travel for work, there are many places with a cigarette smell when I stay, but this place was very clean and completely free of cigarette odor, so I was very satisfied. I would like to use it again next time.

reviews.title: Great location and clean.
reviews.text: The location was fine and it was clean for an overnight stay! I recommend it.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: It was a case used during a business trip, and everything was good. The only downside was that there were noisy facilities nearby due to external factors.

reviews.title: Very satisfied
reviews.text: The hotel lobby and hallways were really clean and well-maintained. The items provided in the room were hygienic and everything necessary was there, highly recommended. It's excellent for the price!

reviews.title: Great value accommodation.
reviews.text: After checking in late at night, I went up to my room, had a quick bite, and rested well. I appreciate the simple breakfast provided by the owner as a thoughtful gesture for travelers, and I'm thankful for it. If I have any business trips or travel plans nearby in the future, I would love to visit again. I'm leaving well-rested.

reviews.title: It's clean.
reviews.text: There was no smell of cigarettes, and it was clean. There were no-smoking stickers everywhere, and it was well managed. The simple breakfast was good too. I was satisfied with everything except the shower in the bathroom, which was old. Overall, it's a good place to stay for a day at a reasonable price!

reviews.title: The cost performance is decent.
reviews.text: It is spacious and clean, and it has the geographical advantage of being close to the public transportation. There is also a simple breakfast (toast, cereal, milk, coffee) available, which is good for those who are leaving early.

reviews.title: Good cost performance
reviews.text: It was clean, well-located, and very good value for money~ Breakfast is available except on Mondays, so please keep that in mind.

reviews.title: I had a comfortable and restful stay in a spacious and clean place.
reviews.text: It's a wonderful accommodation with a view of the river and the city skyline. I was a bit disappointed that the windows were a bit small, but everything else was great.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The location is good because it's close to Gongsanseong, and I like that I can enjoy breakfast easily. The room is spacious and there is a massage chair, which I also like.

reviews.title: I rested comfortably.
reviews.text: I had milk and frosted flakes toast in the morning.. It was good^^

reviews.title: It was just perfect to stay with my mother.
reviews.text: The accommodation was clean, and especially the bedding was tidy, making for a pleasant stay. I was satisfied. With the breakfast service, I was able to have cereal, milk, toast, and coffee, which also offers great value for money.

reviews.title: Even though it was a rainy day, I had a pleasant time.
reviews.text: It was clean, wider than I expected, and close to the Baekje cultural heritage site, which was great.

reviews.title: Okay
reviews.text: It was clean, comfortable, and the transportation was convenient. The breakfast had everything you could want and the facilities were good too! I recommend it as a place with great cost-effectiveness!
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Twin Room - 2 Gaming PCs Included

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The staff was friendly and welcoming, and the location is spot on.

reviews.title: Perfect accommodation.
reviews.text: The location was good, the facilities were good, everything was great ^^

reviews.title: I came on a trip with my mom and I'm very satisfied.
reviews.text: I liked that breakfast was free and that there were amenities like robes and hair straighteners, which made my trip comfortable and enjoyable. Highly recommended!

reviews.title: A hastily planned trip~
reviews.text: I had a pleasant trip staying at a comfortable and clean accommodation as planned based on the recommended reviews~

reviews.title: I'm leaving after resting well.
reviews.text: The room feels clean and well-maintained. I recommend it.

reviews.title: It was good.
reviews.text: The location was great, and the breakfast in the morning was sufficiently good. There was bread, milk, jam, butter, cereal, a toaster, and drinks. The bed was clean and tidy, and the bathroom was also clean!

reviews.title: A pleasant hotel right in front of Gongju Geumgang Shin-Gwan Park.
reviews.text: I slept really well because the Ace Bed and bedding were so nice! You can see the traces of remodeling as the room has been attentively taken care of. The unique and tidy room condition was great. The first floor, where the front desk is located, is cozy and elegantly decorated. In the morning, you can grab simple breakfast items like bread, cereal, and freshly brewed coffee there and eat in your room. The room has a massage chair, so I enjoyed a nice massage! It's also great that there's a delicious sashimi restaurant nearby, and right in front is Geumgangsinwon Park, perfect for a walk while enjoying the riverside breeze. You can see Gongsanseong Fortress across the street, and the tomb of King Muryeong is a 10-minute distance, while the Sejong City Geumgang Arboretum is 15 minutes away. I'd love to visit again if I go to Gongju!

reviews.title: It looks neat and nice~
reviews.text: It looks clean and nice!
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Twin Room - 2 Gaming PCs Included

reviews.text: 아고다에서 호텔이라고 10만원 넘는 돈을지불하고 현장을 갔으나 기대치에 현저히 모자람.

reviews.title: 더럽고 불친절해요
